name: evgenmil/webhook-storage
description: Framework-agnostic webhook storage layer for PHP. Per-source MySQL tables, single schema, status lifecycle.

scripts-descriptions.test:ci: Full isolated run: create test DB, run all tests, drop test DB.
scripts-descriptions.db:test:setup: Create the test database from WH_TEST_DSN (idempotent).
scripts-descriptions.db:test:drop: Drop the test database from WH_TEST_DSN (refuses non-test names).
